channel.title: screenlock on Sebastian Hoß
channel.description: Recent content in screenlock on Sebastian Hoß

item.title: Lock your screen on SwayWM
item.description: SwayWM uses can use a mixture of swaylock to lock their screen. Place the following key binding in your Sway config: # # Screen lock # bindsym $mod+Ctrl+l exec swaylock -c 000000 $mod+Ctrl+l will lock your screen and turn it to black.
